AMSC799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

AMSC808 Advanced Topics in Applied Mathematics (1-3 Credits) Advanced topics of current interest. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 18 credits.

AMSC819 Applied Mathematics Seminar (1-3 Credits) Advanced topics of current interest. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 18 credits.

AMSC760 Applied Statistics Practicum (3 Credits) A semester long applied applied statistical project (a minimum 10 hours per week or 120 hours in total), in an internship of collaborative research- laboratory setting working on a substantive applied quantitative project with signiﬁcant statistical content. Prerequisite: Must have completed one year of graduate study in Applied Statistics. Restriction: Must have project proposal approved by SAC coordinator.
